name: Verify G+ (Ability Test)
description: Combines verbal, numerical and inductive reasoning. Measures general mental ability — the single strongest predictor of job performance. Adaptive and available remotely.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to draw correct conclusions from numerical data — tables, charts and graphs. Suitable for professional, analyst and finance roles.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to evaluate written arguments and draw logical conclusions from text passages. Critical for communication-heavy roles.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and rules in abstract diagrams. A culture-fair measure of reasoning potential, independent of language or education.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to draw logically valid conclusions from sets of rules and premises. Used for roles requiring structured thinking and compliance.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical and physical concepts including levers, pulleys, gears and electrical circuits. Ideal for engineering and technical roles.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to mentally manipulate 2D and 3D shapes. Useful for design, architecture, engineering and manufacturing roles.

name: Verify Data Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy when checking data in tables against source material. Essential for administrative, data entry and back-office roles.

name: Verify Reading Comprehension
description: Assesses speed and accuracy in reading and understanding written information. Suitable for roles requiring document review and processing.

name: Verify Following Instructions
description: Measures ability to follow complex written instructions. Suitable for entry-level operational, compliance and administrative roles.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Tests arithmetic and calculation ability without a calculator. Measures speed and accuracy in basic numerical operations. Suited for teller, retail and trade roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: The industry-standard Occupational Personality Questionnaire. Measures 32 personality characteristics linked to workplace performance across relationships, thinking styles, and feelings/emotions. The gold standard for personality-based hiring.

name: OPQ32
description: Full OPQ with 32 scales covering all three domains: Relationships with People, Thinking Styles, and Feelings/Emotions. Provides rich personality profiles for development and selection.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Adaptive behavioral assessment measuring key foundational workplace skills including problem solving, initiative, teamwork, planning, adaptability and communication.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures 18 dimensions of motivation that influence an individual's energy and performance at work. Identifies what energizes or demotivates a candidate for better job fit and retention.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Assesses a candidate's suitability for remote and hybrid work arrangements, measuring self-discipline, communication preferences and home-working adaptability.

name: ADEPT-15
description: Adaptive personality assessment measuring 15 key workplace dimensions using item response theory for precise, efficient measurement. Shorter than OPQ with strong predictive validity.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Tests Java 8 proficiency including OOP, streams, lambdas, Optional, and core Java APIs. Suitable for backend developers and software engineers.

name: Java 8 Basic
description: Covers foundational Java 8 concepts for junior developers and recent graduates entering software development.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming skills including syntax, data structures, functions, OOP, and popular libraries. Suitable for software engineers and data scientists.

name: JavaScript
description: Tests JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, closures, async/await, DOM manipulation and modern patterns.

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses SQL proficiency including SELECT queries, JOINs, aggregations, subqueries, stored procedures and database design fundamentals.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests C++ programming skills including memory management, OOP, templates, STL, and modern C++11/14/17 features.

name: C# (New)
description: Measures proficiency in C# including .NET framework, LINQ, async/await, generics and object-oriented design patterns.

name: TypeScript
description: Tests TypeScript knowledge including type system, interfaces, generics, decorators and integration with modern frameworks.

name: React
description: Assesses React library knowledge including hooks (useState, useEffect, custom hooks), context, state management and component patterns.

name: Angular
description: Tests Angular framework knowledge including components, services, dependency injection, RxJS, routing and unit testing.

name: PHP (New)
description: Measures PHP programming skills including OOP, frameworks (Laravel/Symfony), database integration and web application development.

name: Scala (New)
description: Tests Scala programming including functional programming paradigms, Akka framework, Play framework and big data processing with Spark.

name: HTML5 (New)
description: Assesses HTML5 skills including semantic markup, forms, accessibility (ARIA), canvas, local storage and modern HTML APIs.

name: CSS (New)
description: Tests CSS proficiency including selectors, box model, flexbox, grid, animations, responsive design and preprocessors (Sass/Less).

name: Ruby on Rails
description: Measures Ruby on Rails proficiency including MVC pattern, ActiveRecord, RESTful API design, testing with RSpec and deployment.

name: Automata - Fix the Code
description: Practical coding exercise where candidates debug and fix broken code snippets. Tests real-world programming problem-solving skills across multiple languages.

name: Automata Pro
description: Advanced real-world coding simulation where candidates implement features and solve algorithmic problems in a realistic IDE environment.

name: Microsoft Excel (New)
description: Tests Microsoft Excel proficiency including formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, data analysis, charts and advanced functions.

name: Microsoft Word (New)
description: Assesses Microsoft Word skills including formatting, styles, track changes, mail merge and professional document production.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint
description: Tests PowerPoint skills including slide design, animations, master slides and presentation best practices.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Assesses knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, retrospectives and Agile best practices.

name: Situational Judgement Test — Entry Level
description: Scenario-based assessment measuring judgment and decision-making competencies for entry-level and early-career candidates.

name: Situational Judgement Test — Manager
description: Tests managerial judgment in realistic workplace scenarios involving team conflict, performance management and resource allocation.

name: Situational Judgement Test — Professional
description: Presents workplace scenarios for mid-level professionals requiring balanced judgment on priorities, stakeholder management and ethics.

name: Graduate Numerical Reasoning
description: Numerical reasoning test calibrated for graduate-level talent pools. Involves interpreting charts, tables and financial data.

name: Graduate Verbal Reasoning
description: Verbal reasoning assessment calibrated for graduate-level hiring. Measures comprehension of complex written arguments.

name: Sales Ability Test
description: Assesses core sales competencies including persuasion, commercial awareness, resilience, relationship building and consultative selling.

name: Customer Service Report
description: Measures competencies essential for customer-facing roles including empathy, patience, problem solving and clear communication.

name: Contact Center Simulation
description: Realistic call center simulation assessing multi-tasking, customer handling, data entry accuracy and verbal communication under pressure.

name: Leadership Report
description: Generates a leadership profile from OPQ32 data covering leadership potential, style preferences and potential derailers. Designed for manager and executive selection.

name: Workplace Safety Survey
description: Assesses safety-related attitudes, risk awareness and behavioral tendencies. Critical for manufacturing, construction, transport and field-based roles.

name: Dependability & Safety Instrument
description: Measures personality dimensions linked to safe, reliable and conscientious behavior at work. Identifies risk of counterproductive work behavior.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) 360
description: Multi-rater 360° feedback tool based on SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Assesses 8 competency factors with 20 dimensions for development.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ) — Candidate Report
description: Self-score personality report from OPQ data providing candidates with personal insights on their work style for development and self-awareness.

name: Numerical Reasoning — Interactive
description: High-fidelity interactive version of numerical reasoning with real-world business data scenarios. Provides richer behavioral data than multiple-choice format.

name: Verbal Reasoning — Interactive
description: Interactive format verbal reasoning test with in-depth business text passages for roles requiring sophisticated language comprehension.

name: Inductive Reasoning — Interactive
description: Interactive abstract reasoning with novel puzzle formats that are harder to prepare for and provide richer assessment data.

name: Talent Assessment for Tech
description: Combined technical and cognitive assessment suite designed for technology hiring. Covers programming ability, logical reasoning and problem solving.
